title: Design a Notification System
input_format: Notification requests with recipient, content, and priority
output_format: Delivery status updates through various channels (Push, Email, SMS)
constraints: Handle 1M+ notifications per minute. Low delivery latency. Support prioritized delivery and deduplication. Resilience against third-party provider failures.
function_signature: class NotificationService { send(userId: string, payload: NotificationPayload): string; trackStatus(deliveryId: string): DeliveryStatus; retry(deliveryId: string): void; }
